text: 📝 Хроника специальной военной операции 📝 за 25 апреля 2026 года 🧨 Российские войска нанесли серию ударов по нефтяной и энергетической инфраструктуре в нескольких регионах т.н. Украины. В Днепропетровске «Герани» поразили хранилища топлива и автозаправочную станцию, а в Киевской области налёт пришелся на подстанцию в Белой Церкви . Украинские формирования впервые за время СВО предприняли атаку на промышленные объекты Челябинской области и поразили жилой дом в Екатеринбурге , ранения получили 9 человек. Также ВСУ ударили дронами по объектам на освобожденной территории ДНР и ЛНР, а на подконтрольной ВС РФ части Херсонской области продолжаются масштабные отключения электроэнергии. ➡️ На Бурлукском направлении штурмовики ГВ «Север» освободили Бочково и установили контроль над его окрестностями. Бои постепенно смещаются к Охримовке , освобождение которой позволит создать плацдарм на правом берегу Волчьей . ➡️ На Славянском направлении передовые штурмовые группы достигли канала Северский Донец — Донбасс у Малиновки и стремятся закрепиться на занятых рубежах. Параллельно с этим российские подразделения оттесняют ВСУ из Рай-Александровки и окрестностей Кривой Луки . 📎 Карты в высоком разрешении: 🔸 Обстановка в зоне специальной военной операции ( ru ; en ) 🔸 Бурлукское направление ( ru; en ) 🔸 Славянское направление ( ru; en ) 📍 Онлайн-карты доступны по подписке на map.rybar.ru #Бурлук #дайджест #Екатеринбург #карта #Россия #Славянск #Украина #Челябинск ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 特别军事行动纪事 📝 2026年4月25日 🧨 俄罗斯军队对所谓乌克兰多个地区的石油和能源基础设施发动了一系列打击。在第聂伯罗彼得罗夫斯克，“天竺葵”无人机击中了燃料储存库和加油站；在基辅州，袭击目标是白采尔科维的一座变电站。乌克兰武装部队自特别军事行动开始以来首次对车里雅宾斯克州的工业设施发动袭击，并击中了叶卡捷琳堡的一栋住宅楼，造成9人受伤。此外，乌军还使用无人机袭击了顿涅茨克和卢甘斯克人民共和国解放区的设施，而在俄罗斯武装部队控制的赫尔松州部分地区，大规模停电仍在持续。 ➡️ 在布尔卢克方向，“北方”部队突击队解放了博奇科沃并控制了其周边地区。战斗正逐渐向奥赫里莫夫卡转移，解放该地将有助于在沃尔恰河右岸建立桥头堡。 ➡️ 在斯拉维扬斯克方向，先头突击小组已抵达马利诺夫卡附近的北顿涅茨河-顿巴斯运河，并力求在占领的防线上站稳脚跟。与此同时，俄罗斯部队正在将乌军从赖-亚历山德罗夫卡及克里瓦亚卢卡周边地区击退。 📎 高清地图： 🔸 特别军事行动区局势 ( ru ; en ) 🔸 布尔卢克方向 ( ru; en ) 🔸 斯拉维扬斯克方向 ( ru; en ) 📍 在线地图可通过订阅 map.rybar.ru 获取 #布尔卢克 #摘要 #叶卡捷琳堡 #地图 #俄罗斯 #斯拉维扬斯克 #乌克兰 #车里雅宾斯克 ✈️ RU | ✈️ EN | ✉️ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump explains why he cancelled the U.S delegation’s trip to Pakistan. "Probably heard that we canceled the trip. We have all the cards. We're not gonna spend fifteen hours in airplanes all the time going back and forth to be giving a document that was not good enough. And, so we'll deal by telephone, and they can call us anytime they want. Again, we have all the cards. They have no military left, practically. They have no leaders left. We don't know who the leaders are. Nobody knows who the lead I don't think they know who the leaders are, very importantly.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇵🇰 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普解释了为何取消美国代表团对巴基斯坦的访问。“可能听说我们取消了行程。我们掌握着所有筹码。我们不会一直花十五个小时在飞机上往返，去递交一份不够好的文件。所以我们将通过电话处理，他们随时可以给我们打电话。再说一次，我们掌握着所有筹码。他们几乎没有剩下什么军队了。他们没有剩下什么领导人了。我们不知道领导人是谁。没人知道领导人是……我认为他们自己都不知道领导人是谁，这一点非常重要。” @wfwitness

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇯🇵 The United States and Japan have deployed F-35 fighter jets to Misawa Air Base, strengthening deterrence in the Indo-Pacific region. On April 24, at Misawa Air Base (Aomori Prefecture, Japan), the U.S. Air Force’s 35th Fighter Wing completed its transition from F-16 aircraft to F-35A jets, increasing its fleet from 36 to 48 units and significantly enhancing its combat capabilities. 🔵 Prior to the deployment, the 35th Munitions Squadron (225 personnel) was activated, and specialized maintenance equipment was delivered, indicating a long-term commitment to sustaining the infrastructure. The modernization is part of a $10 billion Pentagon program announced in 2024, aimed at upgrading U.S. tactical aviation in Japan. Meanwhile, Japan plans to acquire 147 F-35 aircraft, forming the largest fleet of these jets outside the United States. Video is made by Grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇯🇵 美国和日本已在三泽空军基地部署了F-35战斗机，加强了印太地区的威慑力。4月24日，在美国三泽空军基地（日本青森县），美国空军第35战斗机联队完成了从F-16飞机到F-35A喷气式飞机的过渡，将其机队从36架增加到48架，显著增强了其作战能力。🔵 在部署之前，第35弹药中队（225名人员）已启动，并交付了专门的维护设备，表明了对维持基础设施的长期承诺。此次现代化是五角大楼2024年宣布的一项100亿美元计划的一部分，旨在升级美国在日本的战术航空力量。与此同时，日本计划采购147架F-35飞机，这将成为美国以外最大的此类机队。视频由Grok AI制作 推文

TRUMP: It's a big industry, and we want to beat China https://twitter.com/atrupar/status/2048120808426385778/video/1 - Aaron Rupar tweet

text: Visioner 🇩🇪 In Germany, a phishing attack on Signal accounts of politicians, journalists, and NATO servicemen took place, — DW A number of officials became victims of the attacks - politicians from almost all factions of the Bundestag were targeted, including: Education Minister Prinz, Construction Minister Hubertz, and Bundestag President Kloeckner. Moreover, Kloeckner is a member of the presidium of Merz's CDU party, and they had their own party chat in the messenger. Similar incidents were previously reported in the Netherlands and the United Kingdom. The Federal Prosecutor's Office of Germany has opened a criminal case on suspicion of espionage. The German government has information that Russia is behind this attack. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇩🇪 在德国，针对政客、记者和北约军人Signal账户的网络钓鱼攻击发生，——德国之声。多名官员成为攻击受害者——几乎所有联邦议院派系的政客都成为了目标，包括：教育部长普林茨、建设部长胡伯茨和联邦议院议长克洛克纳。此外，克洛克纳是默茨基民盟党主席团成员，他们在该通讯软件上有自己的党内聊天群。此前在荷兰和英国也报告了类似事件。德国联邦检察院已以涉嫌间谍罪立案。德国政府掌握的信息显示，俄罗斯是此次攻击的幕后黑手。推文

text: Michael A. Horowitz Interesting - so Oman is a pit stop, as members likely consult with leadership in Tehran, before Araghchi's return to Pakistan SCOOP: #Iran FM laid out parameters for permanent ending of the war in Islamabad talks. Araghchi, now in Muscat, will revisit Pakistan before heading to Moscow. Few members of his team flew back to Tehran today for consultations & will rejoin him tomorrow. https://www.irannuances.com/2026/04/25/scoop-iran-fm-to-revisit-pakistan-before-moscow/ - Iran Nuances tweet
text_zh: Michael A. Horowitz 有趣——所以阿曼是一个中转站，成员们在阿拉格齐返回巴基斯坦之前可能会与德黑兰的领导层进行磋商。独家：#伊朗外交部长在伊斯兰堡会谈中提出了永久结束战争的参数。目前在马斯喀特的阿拉格齐在前往莫斯科之前将再次访问巴基斯坦。他的几名团队成员今天飞回德黑兰进行磋商，并将于明天与他会合。https://www.irannuances.com/2026/04/25/scoop-iran-fm-to-revisit-pakistan-before-moscow/ - Iran Nuances 推文

text: WarMonitor RT @thenewarea51 : Interesting that a E-3 AWACS (SNTRY25) was orbiting the POTUS TFR over West Palm Beach today. The only time you really see a E-3 working a TFR is when POTUS travels to mountainous regions where radar coverage is lacking like, Maine, Oregon, British Columbia, etc. 🤔 https://twitter.com/thenewarea51/status/2048114758570676321/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor RT @thenewarea51 : 有趣的是，一架E-3预警机（SNTRY25）今天在西棕榈滩上空的总统临时飞行限制区（TFR）盘旋。你真正看到E-3在TFR工作的时候，通常是总统前往缅因州、俄勒冈州、不列颠哥伦比亚省等缺乏雷达覆盖的山区时。🤔 https://twitter.com/thenewarea51/status/2048114758570676321/photo/1 推文

text: WarMonitor U.S. military bases and equipment in the Persian Gulf took far more damage from Iranian strikes than publicly acknowledged, with repair costs expected to run into the billions. (NBC) tweet

text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇸🇾🇱🇧 MTV：叙利亚过渡总统艾哈迈德·沙拉（Ahmad Al sharaa）会见了黎巴嫩德鲁兹派领导人瓦利德·琼布拉特（Walid Jumblat）。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇸🇾 🇸🇾 🇱🇧 叙利亚国家电视台发布了一张照片，展示了叙利亚过渡总统艾哈迈德·沙拉与黎巴嫩德鲁兹派领导人瓦利德·琼布拉特今日的突访。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧 Al Jadeed: The government commissioner to the military court, Judge Claude Ghanem, has launched an investigation with 5 State Security personnel regarding the Sakiet al-Janzir incident. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Following the wave of condemnation across political parties and the residents of Beirut including the Lebanese Prime minister Nawaf Salam on the ISF raid that was carried out without a warrant and with the use of force and what described as “mafia style” the ISF has released “Abu Ali” with residents flocking to the streets chanting his name. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧 Al Jadeed：军事法庭政府专员克劳德·加内姆（Claude Ghanem）法官已对5名国家安全人员就萨基特·阿尔-詹齐尔（Sakiet al-Janzir）事件展开调查。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 在各政党和贝鲁特居民（包括黎巴嫩总理纳瓦夫·萨拉姆）对内政部安全部队（ISF）在没有搜查令且使用武力（被描述为“黑手党风格”）的情况下进行突袭表示谴责后，ISF释放了“阿布·阿里”（Abu Ali），居民们涌上街头高呼他的名字。@wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧 The General Directorate of State Security announced the following: As part of ongoing efforts to curb violations affecting economic security, a patrol was dispatched to apprehend a private generator owner in Beirut who had failed to comply with a summons…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Al Jadeed: The government commissioner to the military court, Judge Claude Ghanem, has launched an investigation with 5 State Security personnel regarding the Sakiet al-Janzir incident. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧 国家安全总局宣布：作为遏制影响经济安全违规行为持续努力的一部分，一支巡逻队被派往贝鲁特逮捕一名未遵守传唤的私人发电机所有者……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 Al Jadeed：军事法庭政府专员克劳德·加内姆法官已对5名国家安全人员就萨基特·阿尔-詹齐尔事件展开调查。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 The Lebanese ministry of health has announced that two people have died and 17 wounded in the raid on Safad al-Battikh, southern Lebanon earlier today. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩卫生部宣布，今天早些时候对黎巴嫩南部萨法德·阿尔-巴蒂赫（Safad al-Battikh）的突袭造成两人死亡，17人受伤。@wfwitness

text: 🔄 Forwarded from Fotros Resistance: 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 | Summary of Iran’s FM visit to Islamabad: 1. Emphasis on the 10 conditions & full commitment to them. 2. Readiness for rational & fair negotiation. 3. US has no right to set red lines for talks. 4. Iran will not surrender to US excesses (including no naval blockade) 5. The need for Pakistan's neutrality @FotrosResistancee
text_zh: 🔄 转发自 Fotros Resistance：🇮🇷 🇺🇸 | 伊朗外交部长访问伊斯兰堡总结：1. 强调10项条件并完全致力于此。2. 为理性且公平的谈判做好准备。3. 美国无权为谈判设定红线。4. 伊朗不会屈服于美国的过分要求（包括不进行海上封锁）。5. 巴基斯坦保持中立的必要性 @FotrosResistancee

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Iran's Central Headquarters of Hazrat Khatam al-Anbiya warned the U.S. that if they continue their blockade and seizure of Iranian vessels that they will face the reaction of the IRGC. "If the aggressive US military continues its siege, piracy, and maritime robbery in the region, be assured that they will face the reaction of Iran's powerful armed forces. The United States should know that the armed forces of the Islamic Republic of Iran possess greater power and readiness than before to defend sovereignty, territory, and national interests, a power and offensive capability that their army experienced during the Third Imposed War. We are ready and determined to monitor the behavior and movements of enemies in the region and continue managing and controlling the strategic Strait of Hormuz. In the event of another aggression by the American Zionist enemies, we will inflict even more severe damage upon them." Video is made by Grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗哈塔姆·安比亚中央总部警告美国，如果他们继续封锁和扣押伊朗船只，将面临伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队的反应。“如果咄咄逼人的美军继续在地区内进行围困、海盗行为和海上抢劫，请确信他们将面临伊朗强大武装力量的反应。美国应该知道，伊朗伊斯兰共和国武装力量拥有比以往更强大的力量和准备来捍卫主权、领土和国家利益，这种力量和进攻能力是他们的军队在第三次强加战争中所经历过的。我们已准备好并决心监视敌人在该地区的行为和动向，并继续管理和控制战略性的霍尔木兹海峡。如果美国犹太复国主义敌人再次进行侵略，我们将对他们造成更严重的损害。” 视频由 Grok AI 推文制作

text: WarMonitor For those who use this platform for news, try switching to the “Following” tab. It lets you take control of your feed by showing accounts you follow, instead of the “For You” tab where the algorithm decides what you see. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048116735044120607/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 对于那些使用此平台获取新闻的人，尝试切换到“正在关注”选项卡。它让你通过显示你关注的账户来控制你的信息流，而不是在“为你推荐”选项卡中由算法决定你看到的内容。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048116735044120607/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel President Trump: We’re not going to be traveling 15–16 hours to have a meeting with people nobody has ever heard of. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048116439383490997/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普总统：我们不会为了与没人听说过的人会面而长途跋涉15-16小时。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048116439383490997/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: Pakistan is terrific. I think the field marshal is fantastic, and I think the prime minister of Pakistan is great. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048116027465097294/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：巴基斯坦非常棒。我认为陆军元帅很棒，我认为巴基斯坦总理也很棒。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048116027465097294/video/1 推文

text: Faytuks News Trump told reporters that he recieved a fresh "offer" from Iran 10 minutes after canceling the Pakistan meeting. This new proposal was "much better than previous proposals... they offered a lot but not enough", per POTUS. Travel pool 7 gaggle snippets ✈️ Trump dealt with a number of subjects under the wing. Very hard to hear. On crypto, need to build industry to compete with China. On Iran, got another fresh offer 10 minutes after canceling Pakistan meeting. On Fed, still wants investigation of expensive building. Trump boarded the plane at 2:31 pm. Consider this your last message before wheels up. Bart Jansen USA TODAY Sat. Apr. 25, 2:35 PM - White House Press Pool Reports tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 特朗普告诉记者，他在取消巴基斯坦会议10分钟后收到了伊朗的一份新“提议”。据美国总统称，这份新提案“比之前的提案好得多……他们提供了很多，但还不够”。随行记者团7条简讯 ✈️ 特朗普在机翼下处理了多个议题。很难听清。关于加密货币，需要建立产业以与中国竞争。关于伊朗，在取消巴基斯坦会议10分钟后又收到了另一份新提议。关于美联储，仍然希望调查昂贵的建筑。特朗普于下午2:31登机。请将此视为起飞前的最后一条消息。Bart Jansen USA TODAY 周六，4月25日，下午2:35 - 白宫记者团报道 推文

text: WarTranslated RT @Tatarigami_UA : Quick SITREP on the developing situation in Mali, based on open-source information and private reports that I consider relatively reliable 🧵 : tweet

text: Open Source Intel Trump: Iran offered a lot, but not enough https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048115162951872635/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：伊朗提供了很多，但还不够 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048115162951872635/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump on Iran: "Got another fresh offer 10 minutes after canceling Pakistan meeting. We received a new document that was much better. They offered a lot, but not enough." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048114859091304629/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普谈伊朗：“在取消巴基斯坦会议10分钟后又收到了另一份新提议。我们收到了一份比之前好得多的新文件。他们提供了很多，但还不够。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048114859091304629/video/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Donald Trump: "The Iranians presented us with an offer — but it was not enough." Trump touched on the cancellation of his representatives' visit to Pakistan and noted that Iran sent a document that did not meet expectations. According to him, about 10 minutes after the visit was canceled, they received a new, improved document, but it was also "not enough." He also told reporters: "We will handle everything by phone and they can call us anytime. All the cards are in our hands. They almost no longer have an army and have no leaders — even we don't know who their leaders are." tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 唐纳德·特朗普：“伊朗人向我们提交了一份提议——但还不够。”特朗普谈到了取消其代表访问巴基斯坦一事，并指出伊朗发送的文件未达到预期。据他称，在访问取消约10分钟后，他们收到了一份新的、改进后的文件，但仍然“不够”。他还告诉记者：“我们将通过电话处理一切，他们可以随时打电话给我们。所有的牌都在我们手中。他们几乎不再拥有军队，也没有领导人——甚至我们都不知道他们的领导人是谁。” 推文

text: WarMonitor This is just Trump trying to pretend like he's in control. But like the Boy Who Cried Wolf, people are starting to tune it out as noise. Trump told reporters that he recieved a fresh "offer" from Iran 10 minutes after canceling the Pakistan meeting. This new proposal was "much better than previous proposals... they offered a lot", per POTUS. - Faytuks News tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 这只是特朗普试图假装他掌控局势。但就像“狼来了”的孩子一样，人们开始将其视为噪音而不再理会。特朗普告诉记者，他在取消巴基斯坦会议10分钟后收到了伊朗的一份新“提议”。据美国总统称，这份新提案“比之前的提案好得多……他们提供了很多”。 - Faytuks News 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: If Iran wants, they can call me; we have all the cards. We won everything. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048114237629690194/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：如果伊朗愿意，他们可以打电话给我；我们掌握着所有的牌。我们赢了一切。 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048114237629690194/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump: "I'll deal with whoever runs the show... there's no reason to wait 2 days, have people traveling for 16, 17 hours. When they want, they can call me, we have all the cards." "That whole deal is not complicated: Iran cannot have a nuclear weapon." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048113511327297889/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：“我会与任何掌权的人打交道……没有理由等两天，让人长途跋涉16、17个小时。当他们想的时候，他们可以打电话给我，我们掌握着所有的牌。”“整个交易并不复杂：伊朗不能拥有核武器。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048113511327297889/video/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump on Iran: Got another fresh offer 10 minutes after canceling Pakistan meeting. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普谈伊朗：在取消巴基斯坦会议10分钟后又收到了另一份新提议。推文

text: Open Source Intel An Iranian from Tehran says the city is gripped by fear, internet blackouts and heavy security presence, where daily life has been reduced to survival and uncertainty. Adds that distrust in official information is widespread, checkpoints dominate major intersections, and many residents feel like strangers in their own city. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 一名来自德黑兰的伊朗人表示，这座城市笼罩在恐惧、互联网中断和严密的安保氛围中，日常生活已缩减为生存和不确定性。他补充说，对官方信息的不信任非常普遍，检查站遍布主要路口，许多居民感觉自己像是在自己的城市里的陌生人。推文

text: WarMonitor U.S. consumer sentiment just hit the lowest level ever recorded in the University of Michigan survey, worse than both the 2008 financial crisis and the COVID collapse. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048112105681764355/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 美国消费者信心指数刚刚触及密歇根大学调查记录以来的最低水平，比2008年金融危机和新冠疫情崩溃时还要糟糕。 https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2048112105681764355/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Republican Senator Lindsey Graham voiced support for President Donald Trump’s decision to cancel the Witkoff–Kushner visit to Pakistan aimed at further talks with Iran. ▪️ He stated that Tehran responded to the ceasefire extension with attacks on international shipping and continued provocations. ▪️ Graham added that Trump “did everything possible” by extending the ceasefire, but emphasized that the priority now should be establishing strict control over the Strait of Hormuz and ensuring freedom of navigation under international law. 📌 “To achieve this, short-term U.S. military involvement may be necessary. It’s a risk worth taking to restore freedom of navigation in the strait,” Graham said. Video is made by Grok AI tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：🇺🇸 🇮🇷 共和党参议员林赛·格雷厄姆表示支持唐纳德·特朗普总统取消维特科夫-库什纳（Witkoff–Kushner）访问巴基斯坦的决定，该访问旨在与伊朗进行进一步谈判。▪️ 他表示，德黑兰以袭击国际航运和持续挑衅来回应停火协议的延长。▪️ 格雷厄姆补充说，特朗普通过延长停火协议“尽了一切可能”，但他强调，现在的优先事项应该是对霍尔木兹海峡建立严格控制，并确保国际法下的航行自由。📌 “为了实现这一点，可能需要短期的美国军事介入。这是为了恢复海峡航行自由而值得冒的风险，”格雷厄姆说。视频由 Grok AI 推文制作

text: Open Source Intel Trump: "You probably heard that we canceled the trip. We have all the cards. We're not going to spend 15hrs in airplanes all the time, going back and forth, to be given a document that was not good enough. So, we'll deal by telephone, and they can call us any time they want." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048110235387117856/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 特朗普：“你们可能听说我们取消了行程。我们掌握着所有的牌。我们不会一直花15个小时在飞机上往返，只为了得到一份不够好的文件。所以，我们将通过电话处理，他们可以在任何他们想的时候打电话给我们。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2048110235387117856/video/1 推文

text: Trump: We’re not going to be traveling 15–16 hours to have a meeting with people nobody has ever heard of.
text_zh: 特朗普：我们不会为了和一些闻所未闻的人开会而长途跋涉15到16个小时。
